input.task_spec_stub:
## §1 Goal

Add `--quiet` flag to bake CLI.

## §3 Acceptance

- Flag suppresses INFO logs; WARN+ still emitted.
- Default path unchanged.

## §4 Implementation Plan

1. Parse `--quiet` in CLI entry.
2. Set log filter when set.

invariants.summary: Logs default to INFO+; quiet drops INFO.

sections.goal: Add `--quiet` flag to bake CLI. Drop INFO logs when set.
sections.acceptance:
- `--quiet` suppresses INFO; WARN+ still emit.
- Default path unchanged.
- Unit test: invoking with `--quiet` produces no INFO line.
sections.implementer_latitude: Sink filter implementation: env var or in-process — implementer choice.
